hero.description: Upload any design reference. Extract colors, typography, layout patterns. Then let AI review your UI and suggest improvements.

features.description: From reference analysis to design tokens, one seamless workflow.
features.referenceAnalysisDesc: Upload any screenshot. AI extracts colors, typography, spacing, and layout patterns.
features.moodboardBuilderDesc: Collect references and organize by project. AI finds common patterns across them.
features.uiReviewDesc: Upload your UI and get actionable feedback on hierarchy, consistency, and accessibility.
features.designTokensDesc: Export CSS variables, Tailwind config, or JSON tokens directly into your codebase.
features.beforeAfterDesc: Compare your original design with AI-enhanced versions side by side.
features.selfEvolvingDesc: The more you use it, the smarter it gets. Design trends from usage data feed back into the system.

workflow.description: Upload references you love. Build a design system from them. Then let AI review your work against that system.
workflow.step1Desc: Drag in screenshots from sites you love. Paste URLs. Build your library.
workflow.step2Desc: Colors, fonts, spacing, layout patterns extracted and organized automatically.
workflow.step3Desc: Generate a unified design system from multiple references. Export as tokens.
workflow.step4Desc: Upload your UI. AI compares against your system and suggests improvements.

evolving.description: Every reference you analyze, every UI you review — the system learns. Usage data feeds back into design trend insights and UI improvements.
evolving.bullet1: Trending color combinations from community data
evolving.bullet2: Popular layout patterns updated in real-time
evolving.bullet3: App UI evolves based on aggregated design trends

finalCta.description: Free to start. No credit card required.

workspace.rateLimitReached: Rate limit reached — analyses reset hourly.

analysisPanel.title: Analysis
analysisPanel.aiUnavailable: AI analysis unavailable — colors only. Typography, layout, and token data may be incomplete.
analysisPanel.selectReference: Select a reference to view analysis

feedbackBar.uploadPrompt: Upload references to get AI insights

moodboard.title: Moodboard
moodboard.noReferences: No references yet. Upload some to get started.
moodboard.noAnalysis: Upload and analyze references in the Analyze tab to see aggregated color palettes and design patterns here.

refDetail.noAnalysis: This reference hasn't been analyzed yet.

review.title: UI Review
review.emptyState: Analyze at least one reference first to build a design system for comparison.
review.dropTitle: Drop your UI screenshot to review
review.dropDescription: We'll compare it against your design system
review.designSystemFrom: Design system built from {count} reference{count, plural, one {} other {s}}
review.noIssues: No issues found. Your UI matches the design system well.

tokensView.title: Design Tokens
tokensView.noTokens: AI analysis didn't extract tokens. Try uploading more detailed UI screenshots.
tokensView.emptyState: Analyze references first to generate design tokens for export.

trends.title: Your Design Trends
trends.subtitle: Aggregated from {count, plural, one {# analysis} other {# analyses}}
trends.emptyDescription: Analyze a few references first. Once you have data, popular colors, layouts, and typography trends will appear here.
